entity.summary: Berachain-native decentralized exchange and liquidity platform combining V2 full-range and V3 concentrated-liquidity automated market makers, token swaps, limit orders, liquidity provisioning, routing, and related trading infrastructure.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Kodiak as Berachain's native liquidity platform and describes a non-custodial DEX powered by V2 and V3 AMMs, swaps, liquidity positions, limit orders, routing, and developer interfaces. Current mainnet contract addresses are publicly documented. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Kodiak DEX
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Kodiak as a Berachain-native decentralized exchange powered by V2 full-range and V3 concentrated-liquidity AMMs and describes swaps and liquidity provision.

evidence.title: Kodiak Berachain mainnet contracts
evidence.notes: First-party contract registry publishes current Berachain mainnet V2 and V3 factory, router, position-manager, quoter, aggregator, island, farm, and token addresses, supporting active deployment classification.
